context: Tests whether the agent fetches multiple page types for richer extraction, produces a complete voice.md with vocabulary lists and sample copy, creates a visual.md with the three required sections, and writes an audience.md with all required audience dimensions. Also checks that source-quotes.md contains properly formatted, word-count-limited, URL-credited quotes.

checklist.name: Multiple pages analyzed
checklist.description: At least 2 distinct URLs from the brand's website were visited — evidence in source.json 'sources' array or in the documentation referencing different page types (homepage, About, product, blog)

checklist.name: voice.md — words to use list
checklist.description: voice.md contains a dedicated section or list of specific words or phrases the brand should use in its copy

checklist.name: voice.md — words to avoid list
checklist.description: voice.md contains a dedicated section or list of specific words or phrases that are off-brand or should be avoided

checklist.name: voice.md — 3-5 sample paragraphs
checklist.description: voice.md contains at least 3 sample paragraphs written in the brand's voice (and no more than 5)

checklist.name: voice.md — opening and closing lines
checklist.description: voice.md includes examples of common opening lines AND common closing lines used by the brand

checklist.name: visual.md — typography pairing
checklist.description: visual.md contains a typography pairing recommendation (referencing typeface categories or specific fonts)

checklist.name: visual.md — photo direction
checklist.description: visual.md contains a photo direction section describing the style of photography appropriate for the brand

checklist.name: visual.md — iconography rules
checklist.description: visual.md contains iconography or illustration style guidance

checklist.name: audience.md — primary and secondary
checklist.description: audience.md explicitly distinguishes between a primary audience and a secondary audience (NOT just one audience group)

checklist.name: audience.md — motivations, life stage, triggers
checklist.description: audience.md covers all three of: audience motivations, audience life stage, and purchase triggers (what causes them to buy)
